hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "セッション開始時の自動タスク: /check-in の cron がなければ CronCreate で cron=\"13,43 * * * *\", prompt=\"/check-in\", recurring=true を直接登録（loop スキルは使わない）。check-in 本体は今すぐ実行しないこと（セットアップのみ）。"}}'
hooks.statusMessage: check-in cronをセットアップ中...

hooks.command: if [ -f "$HOME/.claude/hooks/guard-obsidian.py" ]; then python3 "$HOME/.claude/hooks/guard-obsidian.py"; else exit 0; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'

allow: Pushing directly to the main branch is allowed: this is a personal repository where I am the sole contributor, so there is no pull request review process
